chinese_news.title: 36氪首发｜前苹果工程师跨界骨传导耳机，独创技术路线，打破头部企业专利垄断
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 张子怡

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，苏州索迩电子技术有限公司（骨传导运动耳机品牌Mojawa的母公司，以下简称“索迩电子”）于近日完成数千万元人民币的A+轮融资，本轮融资由正海资本领投。

据悉，本轮资金将主要用于拓展海外线下渠道，以及推进产品的AI智能化研发。

在音频产品市场中，由于对无线和开耳式聆听技术的需求不断增加，骨传导耳机市场出现了显著增长。

调研机构Market Growth统计的数据显示，2024年骨传导耳机市场规模为12.8亿美元，预计到2025年将增长到16.11亿美元，到2033年将超过81.5亿美元，复合年增长率为22.8%。

不过，该市场集中度较高，少数头部品牌（如韶音）占据主要份额，并建立相对完善的声学专利布局，提高了新品牌的准入门槛。

索迩电子通过不同的技术路径切入这一市场。公司成立于2020年，早期业务聚焦于B端的触觉反馈技术（Haptics），为VR手柄、智能座舱等提供宽频振动

chinese_news.summary:
今日热点导览

  • OpenAI正考虑采取法律手段起诉苹果公司

TOP 3大新闻

央视确认获得2026年世界杯版权，费用为6000万美元 

5月15日下午，中央广播电视总台与国际足球联合会共同宣布，就国际足联世界杯新周期版权合作达成共识。合作赛事包括2026年世界杯、2030年世界杯、2027年女足世界杯、2031年女足世界杯。

根据双方合作意向，中央广播电视总台确认获得本周期合作赛事中国大陆独家全媒体权利及媒体分授权利，包括开路电视、付费电视、互联网和移动设备等。知情人士透露，中央广播

chinese_news.title: 理想出牌：全新L9上市，45.98万元起｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
理想汽车CEO 李想

能让李想豁出去跳舞挣眼球的发布会，仅在全新一代理想L9上市。

5月15日，理想发布会了全新一代理想L9，推出两个版本——理想L9 livis，售价 50.98万元；理想L9 Ultra版，售价45.98万元。且理想给出了现金2万元的首销权益，截止于6月30日。

chinese_news.title: 36氪联合PureblueAI清蓝发布「2026消费品牌AI推荐力名册」丨AI时代，品牌如何抢占「推荐力」新战场？
chinese_news.summary:
当你打算入手一部新手机、一台冰箱，或是一瓶面霜时，你的第一个动作是什么？是打开电商平台浏览，还是搜索测评文章？当前，越来越多人的选择���：直接问AI。

“20-30万预算，有什么新能源轿车推荐？”“哪款手机拍照更好？”“敏感肌适用什么洁面？”……这些曾经需要查阅大量攻略、对比无数参数的消费决策，如今正被一个个简洁的AI问答窗口所承接。DeepSeek、豆包、通义千问、腾讯元宝等主流AI助手，正以前所未有的深度渗透进我们的消费生活，成为事实上的“第一入口”和“前

chinese_news.title: 长安计划入股千里科技，千里智驾与奥迪推进合作｜36氪独家
chinese_news.summary:
36氪从多位产业人士处了解到，千里科技正积极与长安、奥迪、奇瑞等车企，洽谈智能化合作。

其中，长安不仅有意向搭载千里科技辅助驾驶方案，还计划入股千里科技，双方原定于今年年初完成股权变更。但目前，据知情人士透露，该计划暂无实质性进展。

36氪了解到，北汽是千里科技眼下最具确定性的外部客户，双方计划于今年内成立合资公司。

千里科技与北汽计划合作5款车型，其中包含一款轿车，一款越野车型，还有一款轿跑猎装版。其中部分车型计划于今年发布。

除长安、北汽之外，传统高端品牌奥迪、安徽地方国企奇瑞等车企，也在与千里科技商谈辅助驾驶领域的合作。

千里科技与奥迪的合作较为深入。今年北京车展上，千里科技发布了与北汽合作的汽车品牌”游心“，这与华为和车企的合作模式类似。在这个合作思路下，除了北汽，千里科技也在和奥迪推进合作。

在智能座舱领域，千里科技在与传统豪华品牌奔驰讨论合作。有知情人士告诉36氪：“双方正在谈的，大概率是平台化合作，不止是针对某几款车型。从千里科技为奔驰准备的方案可以看出，都是

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发｜航天发动机核心部件厂商获投，国内唯一具备核心部件一站式制造能力的民营企业
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，北京思创航天精密制造有限公司（以下简称“思创航天”）近日完成新一轮数千万元融资，由丹诚资本独家投资。

思创航天前身为沈阳融创精密制造有限公司航天项目中心（融创精密为上市公司富创精密全资子公司），早在2020年3月便已开始参与航天发动机零部件制造业务，并于2025年正式独立成立公司。

目前，公司专注于航天发动机、卫星及其他航天产品核心零部件的精密制造。主要客户包括星河动力、星际荣耀、东方空间、大航跃迁、中船重工、沈阳铸造所等。

团队方面，公司创始人徐曙宁曾任沈阳富创事业部高级总监和融创航天项目中心总经理。当前团队70余人，其中核心团队均来自原航天项目中心，具备较强的技术延续性与工程协同能力。

随着国内商业航天逐渐进入批量化、低成本、高效率快速迭代竞争阶段，发动机制造环节的重要性持续提升。相比过去以单点零部件供应为主的模式，行业对于核心部组件设计与制造协同、多

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $85,000 on or before June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC just slid to $78k on macro headwinds (Warsh Fed hawkishness, Strait of Hormuz oil crisis), creating asymmetric risk if Trump tech-stock purchases signal broader bullish pivot.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (crypto longs lost $500M on BTC slide to $78k); CNBC (Warsh inflation concerns, Treasury yields surging)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Federal Reserve cut rates at least once by December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Kevin Warsh's appointment and CNBC reporting on FOMC infighting over rate cuts, coupled with global oil stockpile crisis, creates binary outcome on inflation path.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Warsh faces FOMC 'family fight' over cutting, inflation spiking, Treasury yields surging)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum close above $3,500 on or before August 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Cointelegraph headlines point to three catalysts for ETH surge; SOL and XRP down 5% suggests risk-off, but ETH basis and dapp recovery could drive mean reversion if macro clears.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph (Sharplink CEO identifies 3 catalysts for ETH price surge); CoinDesk (crypto longs capitulation signal)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will SpaceX complete its IPO at a valuation above $200 billion by September 30, 2026?

prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (SpaceX targets June 11 IPO pricing, picks Nasdaq)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will XRP trade above $2.50 on or before September 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: CoinDesk reports XRP beat Bitcoin gains as CLARITY Act advanced; House lawmakers urging Trump to fill CFTC suggests regulatory clarity catalyst imminent.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Taiwan issue a formal declaration of independence recognized by at least 5 UN member states by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: UN official records of diplomatic recognition; BBC, Reuters, Bloomberg reporting
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Trump's post-Xi summit warning against Taiwan independence is being read as de-escalation, but market underestimates probability of Taiwan leadership defiance or US policy reversal if China escalates military pressure.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC/BBC (Taiwan insists it is independent after Trump warning; Trump-Xi arms sales standoff on Taiwan remains contentious)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the Strait of Hormuz remain closed (blocking >50% of normal traffic) for >14 consecutive days in 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CNAS, IEA, USNI News reports on Strait transit; oil futures bid-ask volatility >$2/bbl intraday
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: UBS warning of record-low oil stockpiles by end of May is concrete signal of supply shock risk; UAE's OPEC exit (May 1) suggests cartel fracture and geopolitical instability.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (global oil stockpiles could hit record lows if Strait remains closed; UAE leaves OPEC May 1)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Solana (SOL) outperform Ethereum (ETH) by >15% on a 30-day rolling basis at any point between June 1 and August 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko, Binance OHLCV data; 30-day returns comparison
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CoinDesk reports Solana infrastructure (Jump Crypto's Firedancer) rolling out slowly, but Jump Crypto is a heavyweight builder; market underestimates network upgrade impact if Firedancer unlocks 100k+ TPS.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (Jump Crypto's Firedancer taking slow steady approach to Solana rollout); Solana down 5% on May 5 creates oversold entry

market_questions_to_create.question: Will OpenAI's valuation exceed $150 billion in a primary or secondary fundraise by September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: SEC filings (Form D or 8-K), PitchBook, CrunchBase valuation milestone announcements
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Cointelegraph reports OpenAI partnering with Malta on free ChatGPT Plus rollout (public good strategy); 36Kr reports OpenAI considering legal action vs. Apple (escalating competitive posture)—signals aggressive expansion and moat-building.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph (OpenAI partners with Malta for free ChatGPT Plus); 36Kr (OpenAI eyeing legal action vs. Apple)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will US House pass a crypto regulatory clarity bill (XRP/stablecoin focused) with >280 votes by June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: House.gov bill tracker, Congress.gov roll-call votes, Crypto Council for Innovation press releases
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CoinDesk reports House lawmakers overseeing CFTC urging Trump to fill the commission; CLARITY Act momentum on XRP is real, but market underestimates Trump's willingness to push House leadership on crypto infrastructure.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (US House lawmakers urging Trump to fill CFTC; XRP beat BTC gains as CLARITY Act advanced)

investment_theses.thesis: Oil prices will spike >15% within 60 days if Strait of Hormuz closure persists; long crude oil futures / XLE ETF on UBS-flagged stockpile exhaustion risk.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'Global oil stockpiles could hit record lows by end of May due to Strait of Hormuz closure' (UBS data)
CNBC: 'UAE leaves OPEC May 1, signaling cartel fracture and geopolitical instability'
Crude oil structural supply shock now pricing in only 5–10% risk premium vs. historical volatility
investment_theses.counter_view: Strait reopens within 2 weeks, or OPEC increases releases from strategic reserves, defusing shortage narrative.
investment_theses.expression: WTI crude oil futures (Jul 2026 contract) or XLE (Energy sector ETF); entry on dips below $75/bbl, target $85+/bbl by June 30.

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin reprices higher if Fed rate-cut expectations reset upward due to recession signals; Warsh appointment initially hawkish optics, but labor data or credit stress could force FOMC pivot by Q3 2026.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'Kevin Warsh comes into Fed facing big family fight over cutting interest rates'; inflation spiking + yields surging = recession risk if policy over-tightens
CoinDesk: 'Crypto longs lose $500M as BTC slides to $78k'; capitulation signal suggests institutional underweight creates squeeze risk
Trump tech-stock purchases (Amazon, Meta, Oracle, Broadcom) signal bullish macro stance at odds with Warsh's initial hawkishness
investment_theses.counter_view: Warsh holds firm, inflation persists, Fed hikes one more time; BTC retest $70k before recover.
investment_theses.expression: BTC spot or Jun 2026 perpetual futures; entry $78–80k; target $95–100k by Aug 31 on rate-cut repricing.

investment_theses.thesis: Solana infrastructure upgrade (Firedancer rollout) will drive SOL outperformance vs. ETH if Jump Crypto meets 100k+ TPS milestone by Q3 2026; SOL/ETH ratio diverges as network throughput becomes differentiator.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Jump Crypto's Firedancer is taking slow and steady approach to long-awaited Solana infrastructure rollout'
36Kr and Chinese crypto press largely silent on Solana, suggesting Western builders (Jump) maintain tech moat vs. China-centric chains
SOL down 5% on May 5 = oversold entry before infrastructure narrative re-ignites
investment_theses.counter_view: Firedancer rollout delayed 6+ months; ETH Shanghai/Dencun upgrades prove more impactful; SOL network remains plagued by outages.
investment_theses.expression: SOL/ETH perp ratio on Binance or Bybit; entry 0.085–0.095, target 0.12+ by end of Aug 2026.

investment_theses.thesis: DeFi security crisis (KelpDAO $293M hack, THORChain $10M exploit) will drive institutional capital toward regulated staking and yield products; USDY (Ondo US Dollar Yield) and similar RWA tokens outperform native DeFi tokens.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'The $293M KelpDAO hack shows why DeFi is finally being forced to grow up'
CoinDesk: 'Crypto users choosing juicy yields over protection, putting billions at risk'
CoinDesk: 'THORChain confirms $10M exploit, rolls out recovery portal'
USDY appears in crypto trending—institutional flow likely into regulated, audited yield vehicles
investment_theses.counter_view: DeFi exploits viewed as temporary, protocols patch quickly, yields too low on RWA products; users return to higher-risk/higher-reward DeFi.
investment_theses.expression: USDY spot; also long USDY/SOL ratio. Entry on current levels, target 20–30% premium to USD par by Jul 31 as institutional USDC/staking flows migrate to regulated yield.

investment_theses.thesis: Trump tech-stock enthusiasm (Amazon, Meta, Oracle, Broadcom purchases reported) signals structural bullish bias; NVDA and semiconductor complex benefit from defense/AI capex cycle; rotate out of utilities/bonds into mega-cap tech.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'Trump went big on tech stocks in first quarter of 2026, new filings show'; bought Amazon, Meta, Oracle, Broadcom, Motorola, Dell
CNBC: 'Investors are living through Trump's stock market' (record highs narrative)
36Kr: 'NVIDIA总市值超过德国GDP' (NVIDIA market cap exceeds German GDP)—signals market repricing of AI/chip dominance
SpaceX IPO (Jun 11 pricing) will benefit from Trump administration tailwinds
investment_theses.counter_view: Tax policy uncertainty, tariff escalation vs. China undermine equity valuations; rotation to value / defensives if recession signals emerge.
investment_theses.expression: QQQ (Nasdaq 100 ETF) or NVDA outright; also long NVDA/IWM ratio (tech vs. small-cap value). Entry on any 3–5% correction, target SPY 540+ by Aug 31.

_flag_chinese_sources.note: 36Kr (Chinese tech/startup press) reporting actively on AI, automotive intelligence, aerospace/defense manufacturing, and consumer electronics—areas not yet covered by English financial press.
examples: 36Kr exclusive: 千里科技 (Qianli Tech) in talks with Changan, Audi, Chery for autonomous driving partnerships; Changan planning equity investment
36Kr first: 思创航天 (Beijing Sichang Aerospace Precision) raised multimillion-yuan Series A for satellite/rocket engine core components—unique domestic capability
36Kr: 骨传导 (bone conduction) audio startup Mojawa (索迩电子) completed A+ round; former Apple engineer leads; patent moat vs. Shokz
36Kr: Samsung developing next-gen HBM packaging (stacked memory) for mobile devices—potential NVIDIA/TSMC supply chain disruption play
36Kr: 海南 (Hainan) accelerating rocket, satellite, and data infrastructure clusters—state-level manufacturing push in aerospace/defense
_flag_chinese_sources.implication: Chinese sources signal aggressive domestic capex in semiconductors, autonomous vehicles, and space infrastructure. English press lags; investors monitoring Chinese industrials (BYD, CATL, SMIC-adjacent plays) may have early-mover advantage on supply chain themes.
